# hooks-applyRls

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for applyRls

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useApplyRlsMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useApplyRlsMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useApplyRlsMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
